title: Apricot Pancakes
description: A unique twist on traditional pancakes with the sweetness of apricots.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the pancake mix and water until smooth.
The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Grease the pan with a thin layer of vegetable oil.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve warm with apricot jam and diced apricots on top.
